2606.25034.title: Yuvion VL: A Multimodal Foundation Model for Adversarial Content and AI Safety
2606.25034.paper_summary: General-purpose models often struggle to reliably identify and understand real-world multimodal risks, largely due to the inherent multimodal adversarial nature of content and AI safety. We present Yuvion VL, a family of multimodal large language models purpose-built for content and AI safety, with both instruction-tuned and reasoning-oriented variants. Yuvion VL addresses this gap by treating safety as an inherently adversarial and multimodal problem and designing the entire pipeline around adversarial robustness. For data construction, we develop an automated pipeline integrating adversarial-aware data synthesis with multi-stage quality control, producing large-scale, high-quality multimodal samples augmented with domain knowledge and reasoning annotations. For training, we adopt a three-stage pipeline that includes continued pretraining for risk-concept cross-modal alignment, instruct post-training for production-grade safety tasks, and reasoning post-training for enhanced interpretability and performance in complex tasks. We further introduce Confuse-then-Contrast Fine-Tuning, a contrastive framework that mines model-specific confusions and constructs multi-image contrastive groups to enforce explicit discrimination of fine-grained visual-semantic elements, enabling the model to distinguish between visually similar cases with different safety implications in adversarial safety tasks. To support rigorous evaluation, we further introduce Yuvion VL RiskEval (YVRE), a collection of benchmarks covering diverse open and internal evaluations, with a focus on content and AI safety, adversarial robustness, and real-world capability requirements. Experiments show that Yuvion VL-32B achieves industry-leading safety performance, surpassing comparably sized open-source models and best closed-source commercial models, while maintaining comparable general capabilities.
2606.25034.paper_summary_zh: 一般用途的模型往往難以可靠地識別和理解現實世界中的多模態風險，這主要是由於內容和人工智慧安全的固有多模態對抗性質。我們提出了 Yuvion VL，一系列專門為內容和人工智慧安全而構建的多模態大型語言模型，包含指令調整和推理導向的變體。Yuvion VL 通過將安全視為一個固有的對抗性和多模態問題來填補這一空白，並圍繞對抗穩健性設計整個流程。在數據構建方面，我們開發了一個自動化流程，將對抗意識數據合成與多階段質量控制整合，生成大規模、高質量的多模態樣本，並增強領域知識和推理註釋。對於訓練，我們採用三階段流程，包括風險概念跨模態對齊的持續預訓練、針對生產級安全任務的指令後訓練，以及針對複雜任務的增強可解釋性和性能的推理後訓練。我們進一步引入了混淆-然後-對比微調，這是一種對比框架，挖掘模型特定的混淆並構建多圖像對比組，以強化對細粒度視覺-語義元素的明確區分，使模型能夠在對抗安全任務中區分具有不同安全含義的視覺相似案例。為了支持嚴格的評估，我們進一步引入 Yuvion VL RiskEval (YVRE)，這是一組基準，涵蓋多樣的開放和內部評估，重點關注內容和人工智慧安全、對抗穩健性以及現實世界能力要求。實驗顯示，Yuvion VL-32B 實現了行業領先的安全性能，超越了同等大小的開源模型和最佳的閉源商業模型，同時保持了相當的通用能力。
2606.25034.author: Shikai Qiu et.al.
